problem: What enzyme or organism efficiently degrades all plastic types at scale?
hypothesis: If Self-assembled monolayer for surface functionalization is applied to types, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: In vitro biocompatibility assay with 29 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
